description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image `registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing:ubuntu-bionic-python36` and set `GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY` to `recursive`. Define a single `compile` job in the `build` stage that is excluded from any branch matching the regex `/^(dev-)?dist-.*$/`. In the job run the following script commands in order: `set -o errexit`, `echo \"Compiling\"`, `mkdir javascript golang python`, `cp -a d3m_automl_rpc setup.py python/`, `for fi in *.proto; do echo \"File $fi\"; protoc -I . -I /protoc3/include ${fi} --go_out=plugins=grpc:golang/ --go_opt=paths=source_relative --js_out=import_style=commonjs,binary:javascript/; python3 -m grpc_tools.protoc -I . -I /protoc3/include --python_out=python/d3m_automl_rpc/ --grpc_python_out=python/d3m_automl_rpc/ ${fi}; done`, `(cd python/d3m_automl_rpc; sed -i -E 's/^import.*_pb2/from . \\0/' *.py)`, `echo \"__version__ = '$(grep -oP '(?<=option \\ (protocol_version\\) = \" )[^"]+(?=\";)' core.proto)'\" >> python/d3m_automl_rpc/__init__.py`, `cp README.md python/README.md`, `echo \"Linting\"`, `protoc -I . -I /protoc3/include --lint_out=. *.proto`, `echo \"Installing and testing Python package\"`, `pip3 --disable-pip-version-check install \"git+https://gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/d3m.git@devel#egg=d3m\"`, `pip3 --disable-pip-version-check install python/`, `python3 -I ./run_tests.py`, and a conditional block that if `$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME` is `master` or `devel` and `$GIT_ACCESS_USER` and `$GIT_ACCESS_TOKEN` are set, clones the repository, creates or updates `dist-` or `dev-dist-` branches for each language, copies the generated files, commits with message \"Generated by CI.\" and pushes them. Finally, the job stores the `javascript`, `golang`, and `python` directories as artifacts.
